description_long: This is a cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered, industrial appearance, featuring a muted gray and brown coloration. The surface is marked by vertical paneling and reinforced by two prominent horizontal metal bands, one near the top and one near the bottom. On one side, there is a red triangular warning sign with a black flame symbol, indicating that the contents may be flammable or hazardous. The barrel is open at the top, revealing an empty interior, and lacks any visible lid or cover. The texture is matte and slightly rough, suggesting exposure to outdoor elements and frequent handling. This type of barrel is commonly found in urban or industrial environments, used for storage or disposal of materials.
description: A weathered, open-topped metal barrel with gray-brown tones, reinforced bands, and a flammable warning sign on one side. Its industrial look suggests use for hazardous material storage or disposal.
description_view_0: A cylindrical metal barrel with visible vertical paneling and two horizontal reinforcement bands, no markings visible.
description_view_1: The same barrel, showing a red triangular flammable warning sign on the side, with the same banding and weathered texture.
description_view_2: The barrel's opposite side, showing only the paneling and bands, with no visible markings or labels.
description_view_3: Another unmarked side of the barrel, displaying the same weathered metal surface and reinforcement bands.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
